summary.zh: Agent Persona 编辑器,在 Studio 内直接调每个 agent 的人设。左侧列表选 agent,右侧文本区编辑它的 persona/zh.md,保存后热重载即时生效——不用重启就能改 agent 的语气、职责与行为边界。适合微调 Arin/Iori/Suzu 等内置 agent,或给自定义 agent 打磨人设。
summary.en: The Agent Persona Editor — tune each agent's persona right inside Studio. Pick an agent from the left list, edit its persona/zh.md in the right textarea, and save with hot-reload so changes apply instantly — adjust an agent's tone, duties and behavioral bounds without a restart. Great for fine-tuning the built-in agents (Arin/Iori/Suzu…) or polishing a custom one.

body.zh:
列表选 agent → 文本区编辑 persona/zh.md
保存即热重载,无需重启
body.en:
Pick an agent → edit persona/zh.md in a textarea
Save with hot-reload, no restart

body.zh: 面板管理启用 → 左侧打开「wb-agent-persona」面板
body.en: Enable in Admin → open the 'wb-agent-persona' panel

notes.zh: 首版:persona 编辑 + 热重载
